title: Mesh Food Cover Tent Umbrella, Food Dome, 30cm (11.8") Pop Up Nets for Protecting Food at Parties, Picnics, BBQs, Outdoors, Reusable and Collapsible
features: 🍱🍛🍲🍜 EASY AND CONVENIENT - This handy foldable food cover is ideal for protecting food until you’re ready to serve and is easy to store as it folds away. Dimensions: W30cm x H20cm x L30cm. Ideal for covering all types of foods, including cakes, biscuits, freshly cooked hot dinners and more

🍱🍛🍲🍜 STUDY AND COLLAPSABLE - The framework of the food umbrella tent is made of high quality galvanised steel so that it can offer sturdy support, extremely easy to pop-up and fold for storage, just pull the cord to pop up and press the button to release!

🍱🍛🍲🍜 SUPER FINE POLYESTER MESH - The mesh protects food while keeping it ventilated and visible, keeps food safe from insects and bugs, great for any indoor or outdoor eating, such as garden BBQs, picnics, camping trips, and pool parties
🍱🍛🍲🍜 EASY TO WASH - Simply hand wash, just rinse in a little cool water, dunk it in warm soapy water, open and let dry
description: Product Description Pop Up Umbrella style Food tent Anti Insect The finely crafted polyester mesh not only provides a protective shield for your food but also ensures optimal ventilation and visibility. Safeguarding your dishes from insects and bugs, this mesh allows you to proudly display your culinary creations with confidence until you are ready to serve. Enjoy the convenience of keeping your food both secure and visible, adding an extra layer of confidence to your dining preparations. Foldable Introducing our versatile foldable food cover—an excellent solution for preserving the freshness of your dishes until the moment you're ready to serve. Its practical design makes storage a breeze, effortlessly folding away while maintaining sturdiness and collapsibility. With dimensions of W30cm x H20cm x L30cm, it offers ample coverage for various culinary delights. This reliable accessory not only ensures the safety of your food but also enhances your storage convenience, making every meal preparation a seamless experience. Hanging Loop Featuring an additional touch of convenience, our foldable food cover comes equipped with a practical hanging loop. This thoughtful addition not only makes storage a breeze but also facilitates quick and efficient drying after washing. Cleaning is a cinch – simply wash it in warm soapy water, and then effortlessly hang it to dry. This easy-to-follow cleaning process ensures that you can use the food cover repeatedly, making it a durable and sustainable choice for your culinary needs. Enjoy the benefits of a hassle-free cleaning routine and the convenience of reusing this handy accessory for a variety of occasions. Pretty in Lace The intricate lace detail adds charm, elevating the visual appeal of your culinary delights and enhancing the overall attractiveness of your table setting. This attention to detail reflects our commitment to functionality and aesthetics, ensuring your food is both protected and presented in a visually pleasing manner. Versatility is a key feature, with an easy-to-store design suitable for various events. Whether you're a professional caterer or a home chef preparing for a special dinner, the convenience of easily folding away this food cover adds efficiency to your meal preparation. Different Occasions Display your Cakes and Bakes Great to display Cakes, Savory bakes and Party food at any occasion. Great for Summer BBQ'S Fantastic to use outside for Summer BBQ foods and salads etc. Great for your Days out and family Picnics Great to take along on your picnics and day's out to protect your food whilst in Parks. Great for Family Beach Days Great to take down to the Beach to protect your food from the Mosquito's and sand flies.
